name: RiskSense
description: This app integrates with the RiskSense platform to perform investigative and generic actions to detect and monitor vulnerabilities across the entire attack surface, hosts and applications, using RiskSense's inherent intelligence-driven risk analytics to manage and control an organization's cyber risk

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of users to return (Default: 1000)

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of tags to return (Default: 1000)

parameters.name: fieldname
parameters.description: Host attributes to filter the results (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: Operators to be applied on the provided fieldnames (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Values for the respective fieldnames (allows JSON formatted list)

parameters.name: exclusivity
parameters.description: This parameter allows the user to determine whether to fetch the results that are matching the filter criteria (defined by the Fieldname, Operator, and Value parameter) or to fetch the results that are not matching the filter criteria

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Host attributes to sort the results (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: sort_direction
parameters.description: Sort direction values for the respective host attributes in sort by parameter (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Index of the starting page to fetch the results (Default: 0)

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of hosts to return (Default: 1000)

parameters.name: fieldname
parameters.description: App attributes to filter the results (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: Operators to be applied on the provided fieldnames (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Values for the respective fieldnames (allows JSON formatted list)

parameters.name: exclusivity
parameters.description: This parameter allows the user to determine whether to fetch the results that are matching the filter criteria (defined by the Fieldname, Operator, and Value parameter) or to fetch the results that are not matching the filter criteria

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: App attributes to sort the results (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: sort_direction
parameters.description: Sort direction values for the respective app attributes in sort by parameter (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Index of the starting page to fetch the results (Default: 0)

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of apps to return (Default: 1000)

parameters.name: fieldname
parameters.description: Unique host finding attributes to filter the results (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: Operators to be applied on the provided fieldnames (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Values for the respective fieldnames (allows JSON formatted list)

parameters.name: exclusivity
parameters.description: This parameter allows the user to determine whether to fetch the results that are matching the filter criteria (defined by the Fieldname, Operator, and Value parameter) or to fetch the results that are not matching the filter criteria

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Unique host finding attributes to sort the results (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: sort_direction
parameters.description: Sort direction values for the respective unique host finding attributes in sort by parameter (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Index of the starting page to fetch the results (Default: 0)

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of unique findings to return (Default: 1000)

parameters.name: fieldname
parameters.description: Host finding attributes to filter the results (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: Operators to be applied on the provided fieldnames (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Values for the respective fieldnames (allows JSON formatted list)

parameters.name: exclusivity
parameters.description: This parameter allows the user to determine whether to fetch the results that are matching the filter criteria (defined by the Fieldname, Operator, and Value parameter) or to fetch the results that are not matching the filter criteria

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Host finding attributes to sort the results (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: sort_direction
parameters.description: Sort direction values for the respective host finding attributes in sort by parameter (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status of the host findings. Valid values: Open/Closed

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Index of the starting page to fetch the results (Default: 0)

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of host findings to return (Default: 1000)

actions.name: List Filter Attributes
actions.description: List all the filter attributes of a given asset type

parameters.name: asset_type
parameters.description: Type of the asset of which the filter attributes will be fetched. Example: host, hostFinding, application, applicationFinding

actions.name: Get Hosts
actions.description: Fetch the details for the host(s) for the given host name or host ID

parameters.name: host_id
parameters.description: The host ID of the host to be fetched

parameters.name: host_name
parameters.description: The host name of the host to be fetched

actions.name: Get Host Finding
actions.description: Fetch the details for the single host finding for the given host finding ID

parameters.name: host_finding_id
parameters.description: The host finding ID of the host finding to be fetched

actions.name: Get App
actions.description: Fetch the details for the single app for the given app ID

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: The app ID of the application to be fetched

parameters.name: host_finding_id
parameters.description: The host finding ID for which the vulnerabilities is to be fetched

actions.name: Tag Asset
actions.description: Tag the assets that are fetched using the filter

parameters.name: tag_name
parameters.description: Name of the tag to be associated

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Type of the asset/entity to which the tag will be applied

parameters.name: fieldname
parameters.description: Attributes of the asset type to filter the results (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: operator
parameters.description: Operators to be applied on the provided fieldnames (allows comma-separated)

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Values for the respective fieldnames (allows JSON formatted list)

parameters.name: exclusivity
parameters.description: This parameter allows the user to determine whether to fetch the results that are matching the filter criteria (defined by the Fieldname, Operator, and Value parameter) or to fetch the results that are not matching the filter criteria

parameters.name: create_new_tag
parameters.description: Create a new tag or not if the tag does not exist

parameters.name: tag_type
parameters.description: Type of the new tag (required field when Create New Tag is enabled)

parameters.name: tag_description
parameters.description: Description of the new tag (required field when Create New Tag is enabled)

parameters.name: tag_owner_id
parameters.description: Owner of the new tag (required field when Create New Tag is enabled)

parameters.name: tag_color
parameters.description: Color of the new tag (required field when Create New Tag is enabled)

parameters.name: propagate_to_all_findings
parameters.description: Detonates if an asset tag should be applied to all its findings (required field when Create New Tag is enabled)
